parameters.subject: Special gift for you from Ridelytics !

parameters.query:
SELECT
    r.RiderID,
    r.FirstName,
    r.LastName,
    r.Email,
    r.PhoneNumber,

    COUNT(ft.TripID) AS TotalTrips,

    SUM(ft.FinalFare) AS TotalSpend,

    DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        MAX(dd.FullDate),
        GETDATE()
    ) AS DaysSinceLastTrip,

    r.HomeZoneID,

    'RE'
    + CAST(r.RiderID AS NVARCHAR(10))
    + UPPER(
        SUBSTRING(
            CONVERT(NVARCHAR(36), NEWID()),
            1,
            4
        )
    ) AS PromoCode

FROM dbo.Dim_Rider r

JOIN dbo.Fact_Trip ft
    ON r.RiderKey = ft.RiderKey

JOIN dbo.Dim_Date dd
    ON ft.RequestDateKey = dd.DateKey

GROUP BY
    r.RiderID,
    r.FirstName,
    r.LastName,
    r.Email,
    r.PhoneNumber,
    r.HomeZoneID

HAVING
    DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        MAX(dd.FullDate),
        GETDATE()
    ) BETWEEN 30 AND 60

INSERT INTO dbo.Dim_Promotion_Automation
(
    PromoCode,
    Campaign,
    DiscountPercentage,
    MaxUsageCount,
    StartDate,
    EndDate,
    Status
)
VALUES
(
    '{{ $json.PromoCode }}',
    'Churn Re-Engagement Auto',
    15,
    1,
    CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),
    CAST(DATEADD(DAY, 14, GETDATE()) AS DATE),
    'Active'
);
